request_approved.title: Request approved
request_approved.message: Your leave request was approved and added to the calendar.

request_rejected.title: Request rejected
request_rejected.message: Your leave request was rejected. Contact the office for details.

assignment_created.title: New assignment
assignment_created.message: You have a new assignment on {{date}}.

checkin_added_to_einsatzplan.title: Check-in approved
checkin_added_to_einsatzplan.message: Your morning check-in was approved. Tap Start journey when you leave.
checkin_added_to_einsatzplan.message_with_company: Your {{company}} assignment is ready. Tap Start journey when you leave.

transport_approved.title: Transport request approved
transport_approved.message: Your transport request was approved and an assignment was created.

license_check_due.title: License check due
license_check_due.message: Complete your digital license check in the app: front, back, and selfie.

license_check_reminder.title: License check reminder
license_check_reminder.message: Your license check is still pending. Please complete it today.

license_check_approved.title: License check approved
license_check_approved.message: Your digital license check was approved.

license_check_rejected.title: License check rejected
license_check_rejected.message: Your license check was rejected. Please resubmit.

departure_check_reminder.title: Departure check missing
departure_check_reminder.message: Complete your morning vehicle check before starting work.

defect_confirm_due.title: Confirm repaired defect
defect_confirm_due.message: A repaired defect is waiting for your confirmation in the app.

fine_assigned.title: New traffic fine
fine_assigned.message: Fine for {{plate}} on {{date}} — please acknowledge in the app.
